dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal describes a range-bound pattern with failed breakout and lower boundary respect. Entry uses pivot support level (s1) as proxy for range lower boundary, with ADX < 25 to confirm range-bound (non-trending) regime. Exit triggers when price closes above the support level (lower boundary respected = exit signal to avoid being trapped). The pattern implies a short position that should be closed when the market moves higher (price crosses above support).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal describes a range-bound pattern with failed breakout and lower boundary respect. Entry uses pivot support level (s1) as proxy for range lower boundary, with ADX < 25 to confirm range-bound (non-trending) regime. Exit triggers when price closes above the support level (lower boundary respected = exit signal to avoid being trapped). The pattern implies a short position that should be closed when the market moves higher (price crosses above support).

source_rule_text: When the lower boundary of a range is respected after a failed breakout, shorts should book out to avoid being trapped on the other side of the market.
